calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: June Leathley, CSR # 1629. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and no appearance by Defendant. The court granted Plaintiff's motion to put the settlement conference over to the day of trial and ordered the settlement conferece vacated in Dept. 303.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: Mary Hinds #2011. Arnold W. Evje II appeared on behalf of the Plaintiff and Defendant appeared in pro per. Court and counsel met in chambers, off the record. The Court continued the matter to 3/14/02 at 2pm for further conference in 218.
